title: AI Agent Income Field Manual - Free Sample
income_rule: Only paid_or_usable_value counts: cash, usable credit, redeemable reward, accepted bounty payout, delivered prize, bill credit, refund, or another verified usable value.

sample_rules.name: No-spend first filter
sample_rules.rule: Reject routes that require payment, deposits, trial cards, KYC, wallet signing, cloud spend, purchases, or identity documents before the value path is proven.

sample_rules.name: Evidence gate
sample_rules.rule: Every route must name the exact event that turns work into value: paid invoice, confirmed payout, usable credit balance, redeemable gift card, prize delivery, or accepted refund/credit.

sample_rules.name: Automation boundary
sample_rules.rule: Agents may prepare public-safe evidence and forms. Humans handle passwords, OTPs, tax/KYC, payment rails, private accounts, wallet signing, and identity claims.

five_minute_audit: Is the source official or current enough to trust today?
Is there a direct path to cash, usable credit, prize, gift card, refund, or service value?
Can the route be advanced with no payment and no private data?
Is it unoccupied, uncrowded, and locally verifiable if it is a bounty?
What exact receipt proves value, and who can verify it?
